name: Rohan Deshmukh
summary: Rohan shares his preparation strategy for the CDSE written exam and his 5 days of SSB experience, outlining the importance of logical narration in PPDT.
data: Getting recommended in the first attempt feels surreal. I prepared for CDSE written exam using online materials and NCERT books, focusing deeply on general science and geography. For the SSB, I did not join any coaching; instead, I read newspapers daily to formulate opinions on national security, global politics, and economic reforms. This helped immensely in Lecturette and Group Discussions. Stay fit, speak with clarity, and maintain a pleasant personality. Treat the SSB as a 5-day adventure and enjoy the process.
